steps.expression: async () => { const settings = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); if (!settings.ok) { return `settings:${settings.error.kind}:${settings.error.userMessage}`; } const modelCandidates = Object.entries(settings.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider).flatMap(([providerId, models]) => models.map((modelId) => ({ providerId, modelId }))); const preferredModel = modelCandidates.find((entry) => entry.providerId !== 'ollama') ?? modelCandidates.find((entry) => entry.modelId.toLowerCase().includes('smollm')) ?? modelCandidates.find((entry) => !entry.modelId.toLowerCase().includes('minilm')) ?? modelCandidates[0]; if (preferredModel === undefined) { return 'no-model'; } const modelRefOrNull = { providerId: preferredModel.providerId, modelId: preferredModel.modelId }; const stamp = Date.now(); const plannerName = `Runtime Prompt Planner ${stamp}`; const researcherName = `Runtime Prompt Researcher ${stamp}`; const plannerSave = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: plannerName, systemPrompt: 'You are a planning lead who turns discussion into concrete next steps.', verbosity: 'Short but specific', temperature: null, tags: ['scenario'], modelRefOrNull }); if (!plannerSave.ok) { return `planner-save:${plannerSave.error.kind}:${plannerSave.error.userMessage}`; } const researcherSave = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: researcherName, systemPrompt: 'You are a research lead who brings concrete evidence into the discussion.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['scenario'], modelRefOrNull }); if (!researcherSave.ok) { return `researcher-save:${researcherSave.error.kind}:${researcherSave.error.userMessage}`; } const memberAgentIds = [plannerSave.value.agent.id, researcherSave.value.agent.id]; const manualTitle = `Runtime Prompt Manual ${stamp}`; const manualSave = await window.api.councils.save({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', id: null, title: manualTitle, topic: 'Validate manual runtime prompt flows', goal: 'Confirm prompt-driven runtime actions stay stable', mode: 'manual', tags: ['scenario'], memberAgentIds, memberColorsByAgentId: {}, conductorModelRefOrNull: modelRefOrNull }); if (!manualSave.ok) { return `manual-save:${manualSave.error.kind}:${manualSave.error.userMessage}`; } const manualStart = await window.api.councils.start({ viewKind: 'councilView', id: manualSave.value.council.id, maxTurns: null }); if (!manualStart.ok) { return `manual-start:${manualStart.error.kind}:${manualStart.error.userMessage}`; } const autopilotTitle = `Runtime Prompt Auto ${stamp}`; const autopilotSave = await window.api.councils.save({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', id: null, title: autopilotTitle, topic: 'Validate autopilot runtime prompt flows', goal: 'Complete one autopilot step cleanly', mode: 'autopilot', tags: ['scenario'], memberAgentIds, memberColorsByAgentId: {}, conductorModelRefOrNull: modelRefOrNull }); if (!autopilotSave.ok) { return `autopilot-save:${autopilotSave.error.kind}:${autopilotSave.error.userMessage}`; } const autopilotStart = await window.api.councils.start({ viewKind: 'councilView', id: autopilotSave.value.council.id, maxTurns: 1 }); if (!autopilotStart.ok) { return `autopilot-start:${autopilotStart.error.kind}:${autopilotStart.error.userMessage}`; } const scenario = { manualId: manualSave.value.council.id, autopilotId: autopilotSave.value.council.id, plannerAgentId: plannerSave.value.agent.id }; window.localStorage.setItem('runtimePromptScenario', JSON.stringify(scenario)); return 'ok'; }

async () => { const stored = window.localStorage.getItem('runtimePromptScenario'); const scenario = stored === null ? null : JSON.parse(stored); if (scenario === null) { return 'missing-scenario'; } const injected = await window.api.councils.injectConductorMessage({ viewKind: 'councilView', id: scenario.manualId, content: 'Conductor note for runtime diagnostics.' }); if (!injected.ok) { return `manual-conductor:${injected.error.kind}:${injected.error.userMessage}`; } const generated = await window.api.councils.generateManualTurn({ viewKind: 'councilView', id: scenario.manualId, memberAgentId: scenario.plannerAgentId }); if (!generated.ok) { return `manual-turn:${generated.error.kind}:${generated.error.userMessage}`; } const manualView = await window.api.councils.getCouncilView({ viewKind: 'councilView', councilId: scenario.manualId }); if (!manualView.ok) { return `manual-view:${manualView.error.kind}:${manualView.error.userMessage}`; } if (manualView.value.messages.length < 2) { return `manual-messages:${manualView.value.messages.length}`; } if ((manualView.value.briefing?.briefing ?? '').length === 0) { return 'manual-briefing-empty'; } const advance = await window.api.councils.advanceAutopilotTurn({ viewKind: 'councilView', id: scenario.autopilotId }); if (!advance.ok) { return `autopilot-advance:${advance.error.kind}:${advance.error.userMessage}`; } const autopilotView = await window.api.councils.getCouncilView({ viewKind: 'councilView', councilId: scenario.autopilotId }); if (!autopilotView.ok) { return `autopilot-view:${autopilotView.error.kind}:${autopilotView.error.userMessage}`; } if (autopilotView.value.messages.length < 2) { return `autopilot-messages:${autopilotView.value.messages.length}`; } if (autopilotView.value.council.paused !== true) { return 'autopilot-not-paused'; } if ((autopilotView.value.briefing?.briefing ?? '').length === 0) { return 'autopilot-briefing-empty'; } return 'ok'; }
